text:
Endpoint: GET /fidentity
Summary: Get all fidentity process
Description: Retrieves a list of fidentity processes from the service. By default the last 5 days are returned (max 1000 processes).
Tags: fidentity
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 500: general error

Endpoint: GET /fidentity/{extId}
Summary: Gets a fidentity process by extId from the service.
Description: Retrieves a single fidentity with the given extId from the service.
Tags: fidentity
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 500: general error

Endpoint: GET /fidentity/state/{extId}
Summary: Get state of fidentity process
Description: Retrieves the state of a fidentity process.
Tags: fidentity
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 500: general error

Endpoint: GET /fidentity/refresh-link/{extId}
Summary: get a fresh link for a created process
Description: With this service you can get a fresh link to a existing fidentity process by the extId.
Tags: fidentity
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 405: Invalid input
Response 500: general error

Endpoint: GET /dms/{processId}/{documentId}
Summary: Get document
Description: Get document for a process
Tags: dms
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 500: general error

Endpoint: GET /dms/{processId}/{documentId}/visual-signature
Summary: Get visual-signature for document
Description: Get visual-signature for a document
Tags: dms
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 500: general error

Endpoint: GET /identification/{passkeyUsername}
Summary: Get the user's identification information
Description: Get the user's identification information
Tags: identification
Response 200: success
Response 401: not authenticated
Response 404: not found
Response 500: general error
